casepack.title: Consciousness Coherence Demonstration Stub
casepack.description: Minimal Tier-1 demonstration unit for the consciousness_coherence domain. Full closure code lives in closures/consciousness_coherence/ (coherence kernel across 20 systems, altered states, neural correlates); this casepack is a placeholder packaging demonstration.

run_intent.notes: Stub demonstration unit for the consciousness_coherence domain. Three uniform channels at c=0.99 yield a Stable regime under canon thresholds. Pending replacement with domain-specific raw measurements drawn from the closure code in closures/consciousness_coherence/.
